core_mechanism: a Boltzmann kinetic transport equation balancing a Liouville streaming/drift operator against collision integrals to compute the effective drag force on a moving interface from the out-of-equilibrium perturbation of a particle distribution, with a mass regulator taming an infrared-divergent contribution
brief_reason: The abstract frames friction on the moving wall via a Boltzmann-equation approach with a Liouville operator and collision integrals acting on out-of-equilibrium perturbations, where introducing thermal masses regulates the otherwise artificially enhanced infrared contribution.
